prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次依次约 15382→15634→14553→17975→14795 名，整体呈波动走势；2024 年曾大幅后移至 17975 名，2025 年回弹至 14795 名，近两年波动幅度约 3200 名，显示该校在广东物理类考生中的竞争格局尚不稳定；该校在广东物理类招生计划 2021 年 217 人、2022 年 226 人、2023 年 225 人、2024 年 240 人、2025 年 258 人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；2026 年计划 228 人，较 2025 年减少 30 人（缩招约 11.6%），缩招将加剧竞争，对位次产生上行压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南大学为 985、211、双一流高校；2026 年软科中国大学主榜排名第 31 位，近年排名稳定在 29–32 名之间，属于国内顶尖高校行列；抖音热度排名第 16（高热），综合热度约 310 万，短视频曝光量高；2026 年声誉数据中未见湖南大学被列入负面事件清单，整体声誉平稳，无明显报考心理抑制信号；第五轮学科评估中，化学 A、机械工程 A、工商管理 A、计算机科学与技术 A-、电气工程 A-、控制科学与工程 A-、土木工程 A-、应用经济学 A-，共 8 个 A-/A/A 级学科，工科与管理学科实力均衡，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在 2024–2026 年持续高热推荐，与湖南大学优势学科高度重合，推高相关专业报考热度；广东物理类考生从 2025 年 440208 人增至 2026 年 456000 人（增约 3.6%），竞争基数扩大；湖南大学位于湖南省长沙市，与广东相邻，高铁交通便利，广东考生对湖南高校接受度较高；该校在广 东招生规模较大（物理类 200+ 人），属于省外重点生源省份，地域偏好无明显抑制。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 14795 名、2026 年缩招约 11.6%（推高位次数字减小）、广东物理类考生增加约 3.6%（推高位次数字增大）、学校声誉平稳且抖音高热、优势学科与热门专业高度匹配等关键因素，缩招带来的竞争缓解效应略大于考生增加和热度推升效应，预计 2026 年最低录取位次较 2025 年小幅前移；预测最低位次约 13792 名，区间 13292–14292 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术（含智能实验班）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 人工智能/自动化/机器人工程
- 电子信息工程/通信工程/电子科学与技术
- 数学类/统计学类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 精算学/金融科技/金融学（双学位）
- 会计学/大数据管理与应用
- 经济学类/数字经济/国际经济与贸易（双学位）
- 法学
- 智能制造工程/智能车辆工程/工程力学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 材料科学与工程
- 应用物理学/量子信息科学
- 化学类/生物技术/药学
- 环境科学与工程类/给排水科学与工程/建筑环境与能源应用工程
- 工业设计/智能建造。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 13292–14292 名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报（精算学、会计学、经济学类、智能制造工程等），一档专业（计算机、电气、人工智能等）可作为冲刺选择，三档专业（材料、化学、环境等 ）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<13292 名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>14292 名）建议以二档保稳、三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 15382→15634→14553→17975→14795, showing a fluctuating trend; in 2024, it significantly dropped to 17975, and rebounded to 14795 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 3200 in the past two years, indicating an unstable competitive landscape for this university among Guangdong Physics Category candidates; the enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Guangdong was 217 in 2021, 226 in 2022, 225 in 2023, 240 in 2024, and 258 in 2025, showing a gradual expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 228, a decrease of 30 from 2025 (a reduction of about 11.6%), which will intensify competition and exert upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranks 31st, with a stable ranking between 29–32 in recent years, belonging to the top-tier domestic universities; Douyin popularity ranks 16th (high heat), with a comprehensive popularity of about 3.1 million and high short video exposure; in the 2026 reputation data, Hunan University is not listed in any negative event list, with overall reputation stable and no obvious psychological suppression signals for applications; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has Chemistry A, Mechanical Engineering A, Business Administration A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Civil Engineering A-, and Applied Economics A-, totaling 8 A-/A/A-level disciplines, with balanced strength in engineering and management disciplines, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, highly overlapping with Hunan University's advantageous disciplines, boosting the popularity of related majors; the number of Guangdong Physics Category candidates increased from 440,208 in 2025 to 456,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 3.6%), expanding the competition base; Hunan University is located in Changsha, Hunan Province, adjacent to Guangdong, with convenient high-speed rail transportation, and Guangdong candidates have a high acceptance of Hunan universities; the university has a large enrollment scale in Guangdong (200+ in Physics Category), making it a key province for out-of-province students, with no obvious regional preference suppression.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 14795, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 11.6% (pushing rankings higher, i.e., smaller number), the increase in Guangdong Physics Category candidates by about 3.6% (pushing rankings lower, i.e., larger number), stable reputation and high Douyin popularity, and high alignment between advantageous disciplines and popular majors, the competition mitigation effect from the enrollment reduction slightly outweighs the effects of candidate increase and popularity boost, so the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to move slightly forward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 13792, with a range of 13292–14292.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology (including Intelligent Experimental Class)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Artificial Intelligence/Automation/Robotics Engineering
- Electronic Information Engineering/Communication Engineering/Electronic Science and Technology
- Mathematics/Statistics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Actuarial Science/Financial Technology/Finance (Double Degree)
- Accounting/Big Data Management and Application
- Economics/Digital Economy/International Economics and Trade (Double Degree)
- Law
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering/Intelligent Vehicle Engineering/Engineering Mechanics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Applied Physics/Quantum Information Science
- Chemistry/Biotechnology/Pharmacy
- Environmental Science and Engineering/Water Supply and Drainage Science and Engineering/Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering
- Industrial Design/Intelligent Construction.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 13292–14292, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choices (Actuarial Science, Accounting, Economics, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, etc.), with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, etc.) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Materials, Chemistry, Environment, etc.) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<13292), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>14292), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 for stability and Tier 3 as safety.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类最低位次依次约 2031→2388→2467→3301→2814 名，整体呈后移趋势，2024 年曾后移至 3301 名，2025 年回弹至 2814 名，近两年波动幅度约 500 名；该校在广东历史类招生计划 2021 年 29 人、2022 年 32 人、2023 年 34 人、2024 年 30 人、2025 年 24 人，呈先扩后缩走势；2026 年计划 70 人，较 2025 年大幅扩招约 192%，扩招幅度极为显著，将大幅缓解竞争，对位次产生显著下行压力（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南大学为 985、211、双一流高校；2026 年软科中国大学主榜排名第 31 位，近年排名稳定在 29–32 名之间，属于国内顶尖高校行列；抖音热度排名第 16（高热），综合热度约 310 万；2026 年声誉数据中未见湖南大学被列入负面事件清单，整体声誉平稳，无明显报考心理抑制信号；第五轮学科评估中，应用经济学 A-、工商管理 A 等经管类学科实力突出，与历史类招生专业（经济学类、法学等）高度关联，对文科考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学、汉语言文学等文科专业热度偏热至分化观 望，考公优势明显；广东历史类考生从 2025 年 292200 人增至 2026 年 326200 人（增约 11.6%），竞争基数显著扩大；湖南大学位于湖南省长沙市，与广东相邻，高铁交通便利；该校在广东历史类招生规模从 2025 年 24 人扩至 2026 年 70 人，成为省外重点生源省份，地域偏好无明显抑制。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 2814 名、2026 年大幅扩招约 192%（显著推高位次数字增大）、广东历史类考生增加约 11.6%（推高位次数字减小）、学校声誉平稳且抖音高热、法学等文科专业热度偏高等关键因素，扩招带来的竞争缓解效应远超考生增加和热度推升效应，预计 2026 年最低录取位次较 2025 年大幅后移；预测最低位次约 6000 名，区间 5500–6500 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学
- 经济学类
- 汉语言文学（可选拔进入人文科学试验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 5500–6500 名内，由于 2026 年大幅扩招，建议以二档专业为主力（历史学、哲学、英语），一档专业（法学、经济学类、汉语言文学）可作为冲刺选择，三档专业（行政管理）作为保底。位次明显优于区间 下限（<5500 名）可重点冲刺一档专业；位次接近区间上限（>6500 名）建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2031→2388→2467→3301→2814, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, it moved back to 3301, and in 2025 it rebounded to 2814, with a fluctuation range of about 500 places in recent two years. The enrollment plan for History Category in Guangdong was 29 in 2021, 32 in 2022, 34 in 2023, 30 in 2024, and 24 in 2025, showing a trend of first expansion then contraction. In 2026, the plan is 70, an increase of about 192% compared to 2025, which is extremely significant and will greatly alleviate competition, exerting significant downward pressure on rankings (ranking numbers increase).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In 2026, it ranks 31st in the main list of Shanghai Ranking's Chinese universities, with stable rankings between 29–32 in recent years, belonging to the top domestic universities. Its Douyin popularity ranks 16th (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of about 3.1 million. In the 2026 reputation data, Hunan University is not listed in any negative event list, with overall reputation stable and no obvious psychological suppression signals for applications. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, applied economics is rated A-, business administration is rated A, and other economics and management disciplines have outstanding strength, highly related to History Category enrollment majors (economics, law, etc.), strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as law and Chinese language and literature are hot to differentiated and wait-and-see, with obvious advantages for civil service exams. The number of History Category candidates in Guangdong increased from 292,200 in 2025 to 326,200 in 2026 (an increase of about 11.6%), significantly expanding the competition base. Hunan University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, adjacent to Guangdong, with convenient high-speed rail transportation. Its enrollment scale for History Category in Guangdong expanded from 24 in 2025 to 70 in 2026, making it a key source province outside the province, with no obvious regional preference suppression.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2814, the significant enrollment expansion of about 192% in 2026 (significantly pushing ranking numbers up), the increase of History Category candidates in Guangdong by about 11.6% (pushing ranking numbers down), stable university reputation with high Douyin heat, and high popularity of law and other liberal arts majors, the competition relief effect from enrollment expansion far exceeds the effects of candidate increase and popularity boost. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly move back compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 6000, with a range of 5500–6500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law
- Economics
- Chinese Language and Literature (can be selected into Humanities Science Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- History (can be selected into Humanities Science Experimental Class)
- Philosophy (can be selected into Humanities Science Experimental Class)
- English (can be selected into Language Intelligence Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Public Administration (can be diverted to Urban Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 5500–6500, due to the significant enrollment expansion in 2026, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (History, Philosophy, English), with Tier 1 majors (Law, Economics, Chinese Language and Literature) as sprint options, and Tier 3 majors (Public Administration) as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<5500), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>6500), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety.
